user_token_note: Get a fresh user token from Graph API Explorer each session. The user token is used to generate page tokens on the fly.
how_to_post_ig: 1) Create container: POST /{ig_account_id}/media with image_url + caption + access_token. 2) Publish: POST /{ig_account_id}/media_publish with creation_id + access_token.
quirk: me/accounts returns empty with Facebook Login for Business. Use direct page query instead: {page_id}?fields=access_token

page_token_note: Page token. Refresh by running OAuth flow again when expired.
